list.name: ri
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(owner),''),'Unknown') AS ri FROM monitoring.fact_site_event ORDER BY 1;

list.name: site_type
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT s.site_type::text FROM monitoring.sites s JOIN monitoring.fact_site_event f ON f.site_id = s.site_id WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') LIKE '${ri}' ORDER BY 1;

list.name: site
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT s.description FROM monitoring.sites s JOIN monitoring.fact_site_event f ON f.site_id = s.site_id WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') LIKE '${ri}' AND s.site_type::text LIKE '${site_type}' ORDER BY 1;

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.site_id) AS value FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE $__timeFilter(f.event_start_timestamp) AND COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') LIKE '${ri}' AND s.site_type::text LIKE '${site_type}' AND s.description LIKE '${site}';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.site_type::text) AS value FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE $__timeFilter(f.event_start_timestamp) AND COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') LIKE '${ri}' AND s.site_type::text LIKE '${site_type}' AND s.description LIKE '${site}';

SELECT ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(f.energy_wh,0))/1000.0, 2) AS value FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE $__timeFilter(f.event_start_timestamp) AND COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') LIKE '${ri}' AND s.site_type::text LIKE '${site_type}' AND s.description LIKE '${site}';

SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE $__timeFilter(f.event_start_timestamp) AND COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') LIKE '${ri}' AND s.site_type::text LIKE '${site_type}' AND s.description LIKE '${site}';

SELECT ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(f.cfp_g,0))/1000.0, 2) AS value FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE $__timeFilter(f.event_start_timestamp) AND COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') LIKE '${ri}' AND s.site_type::text LIKE '${site_type}' AND s.description LIKE '${site}';

SELECT s.site_type::text AS site_type, COUNT(*) AS events, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(f.energy_wh,0))/1000.0,2) AS energy_kwh FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE $__timeFilter(f.event_start_timestamp) AND COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') LIKE '${ri}' AND s.site_type::text LIKE '${site_type}' AND s.description LIKE '${site}' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY energy_kwh DESC;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(f.event_start_timestamp, $__interval), SUM(COALESCE(f.energy_wh,0))/1000.0 AS energy_kwh, SUM(COALESCE(f.cfp_g,0))/1000.0 AS cfp_kg FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE $__timeFilter(f.event_start_timestamp) AND COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') LIKE '${ri}' AND s.site_type::text LIKE '${site_type}' AND s.description LIKE '${site}' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(dg.ncores,0)),0) AS value FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id LEFT JOIN monitoring.detail_grid dg ON dg.event_id = f.event_id WHERE $__timeFilter(f.event_start_timestamp) AND COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') LIKE '${ri}' AND s.site_type::text LIKE '${site_type}' AND s.description LIKE '${site}';

SELECT ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(f.work,0)),2) AS value FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE $__timeFilter(f.event_start_timestamp) AND COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') LIKE '${ri}' AND s.site_type::text LIKE '${site_type}' AND s.description LIKE '${site}';

panels.title: Sites in Selected RI (click site for monitoring detail)

targets.rawSql: SELECT s.description AS site, s.site_type::text AS site_type, COUNT(*) AS jobs, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(f.energy_wh,0))/1000.0,2) AS energy_kwh, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(f.cfp_g,0))/1000.0,2) AS cfp_kg, COUNT(DISTINCT f.execunitid) AS monitoring_points FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE $__timeFilter(f.event_start_timestamp) AND COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') LIKE '${ri}' AND s.site_type::text LIKE '${site_type}' AND s.description LIKE '${site}' GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY energy_kwh DESC;
